texto: When I pray - I mean really pray - for people and situations throughout the day, I'm a much humbler person and more sensitive to the lives of the people around me. I am not the master of my fate and captain of my soul. I've tried that, and it makes me more of a task master and a jerk. Prayer puts things in God's hands, and I like the Creator's power more than my own.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mike Tenbusch: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “When I pray - I mean really pray - for people and situations throughout the day, I'm a much humbl…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, christianity, humility pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humility e power.
